Bash(python3 -c "import sqlite3; db=sqlite3.connect\('/c/Users/George Ladikos/AppData/Roaming/Aria/usage.db'\); c=db.cursor\(\); c.execute\(\\"INSERT INTO contracts \(client_name, contract_name, contract_type, monthly_value, start_date, currency, notes, project_code, created_at, updated_at\) VALUES \('Test Client','Test Contract 2026','retainer',3000.0,'2026-01-01','EUR','automated test row','TEST-001',strftime\('%s','now'\),strftime\('%s','now'\)\)\\"\); db.commit\(\); c.execute\('SELECT id, client_name, contract_name, project_code FROM contracts'\); print\(c.fetchall\(\)\)")
